Summary
Former mechanical engineer transitioning to product management. 6 years of engineering experience with growing product ownership. MBA with focus on technology strategy.

Experience
AutoTech Inc — Product Lead (Engineering)
March 2022 - Present
Austin, TX
- Drove product roadmap for the IoT sensor platform, growing ARR from $2M to $8M in 18 months
- Managed cross-functional team of 15 (engineering, design, QA) to deliver 3 major releases on schedule
- Conducted 40+ customer interviews to define product requirements for the V2 platform
- Reduced customer churn by 25% by implementing a data-driven feature prioritization framework

AutoTech Inc — Senior Mechanical Engineer
January 2019 - February 2022
Austin, TX
- Designed sensor housing components using SolidWorks, reducing manufacturing cost by 30%
- Led the transition from waterfall to agile methodology for the hardware team
- Coordinated with firmware and software teams on 5 product launches

GreenEnergy Corp — Mechanical Engineer
July 2016 - December 2018
Denver, CO
- Developed thermal simulation models for solar panel installations
- Assisted in project management for 3 utility-scale installations totaling $15M
